神社本庁教学研究所研究室『平成「祭」データ』（全国神社祭祀祭礼総合調査本庁委員会、1995年） | 神体 = | 社格 = [[式内社]]論社、旧村社 | 創建 = [[仲哀天皇]]～[[応神天皇]]代 | 本殿 = | 札所等 = | 宮司 = | 別名 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nagasaki|label=乙和多都美
神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乙和多都美神社'''（おとわたつみじんじゃ）は、[[長崎県]][[対馬市]][[厳原町]]にある[[神社]]。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記された[[式内社]]・和多都美神社の論社。 == 概要 == 創建の時期は不詳であるが、社伝によると、[[神功皇后]]が当地に船を泊め、神を祀ったという。 [[下県郡]]で唯一（[[和多都美神社]]一帯ははかつて[[上県郡]]であった）の「和多都美神社」であり、『対馬神社誌』には「和田津美大明神」と記されている 式内社研究会『式内社調査報告書』（[[皇学館大学]]出版部）。 『対馬神社誌』の記事の全文では、普通の村の氏神を記しているのと変わらず、和多都美神社としての特色も見られず、官社の伝統も見られない 式内社研究会『式内社調査報告書』（皇学館大学出版部）。 == 参考文献 == * 『対馬神社誌』,長崎県対馬神社総代会,1966. 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3451609 (参照 2025-06-09) == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 出典 === {{reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=長崎県}} {{神道 横}} {{デフォルトソート:おとわたつみしんしや}} [[Category:長崎県の神社]] [[Category:対馬市の歴史]] [[Category:対馬市の建築物]] [[Category:対馬島の式内社]] [[Category:神功皇后]] ==End Japanese==

{{wikidata link|Q134930328}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] {{translated page|ja|乙和多都美神社|version=107360135|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 | 名称 = 乙和多都美神社 | 画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=対馬市}} | 所在地 = {{jalink|長崎県|Q169376}}{{jalink|対馬市|Q991032}}{{jalink|厳原町|Q11410123}}久和字東浜1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|玉依姫命}}、{{jalink|豊玉姫命}}、{{jalink|豊姫命}}？ 神社本庁教学研究所研究室『平成「祭」データ』（全国神社祭祀祭礼総合調査本庁委員会、1995年） | 神体 = | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社、旧村社 | 創建 = {{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}～{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}代 | 本殿 = | 札所等 = | 宮司 = | 別名 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nagasaki|label=乙和多都美
神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乙和多都美神社'''（おとわたつみじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|長崎県|Q169376}}{{jalink|対馬市|Q991032}}{{jalink|厳原町|Q11410123}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記された{{jalink|式内社}}・和多都美神社の論社。 == 概要 == 創建の時期は不詳であるが、社伝によると、{{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}が当地に船を泊め、神を祀ったという。 {{jalink|下県郡|Q10868678}}で唯一（{{jalink|和多都美神社|Q18457651}}一帯ははかつて{{jalink|上県郡|Q10868208}}であった）の「和多都美神社」であり、『対馬神社誌』には「和田津美大明神」と記されている 式内社研究会『式内社調査報告書』（{{jalink|皇学館大学}}出版部）。 『対馬神社誌』の記事の全文では、普通の村の氏神を記しているのと変わらず、和多都美神社としての特色も見られず、官社の伝統も見られない 式内社研究会『式内社調査報告書』（皇学館大学出版部）。 == 参考文献 == * 『対馬神社誌』,長崎県対馬神社総代会,1966. 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3451609 (参照 2025-06-09) == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 出典 === {{reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=長崎県}} {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:長崎県の神社]] [[Category:対馬市の歴史]] [[Category:対馬市の建築物]] [[Category:対馬島の式内社]] [[Category:神功皇后]]

It is located in [[Tsushima]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Q845945|lt=Q845945|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Q135022918|lt=Q135022918|WD=Q135022918}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|WD=Q135026601}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11458212|lt=Q11458212|WD=Q11458212}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.129194444444444|129.25855555555555}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|lt=Q135037878|WD=Q135037878}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306092955/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/680202.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183377 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041548|lt=Q135041548|WD=Q135041548}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '長崎県対馬市厳原町中村', 'language': 'ja'} == described at URL (P973) == * https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183377 [[JA:乙和多都美神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930328}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称 = 乙和多都美神社 | 画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=対馬市}} | 所在地 = {{jalink|長崎県|Q169376}}{{jalink|対馬市|Q991032}}{{jalink|厳原町|Q11410123}}久和字東浜1 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|玉依姫命}}、{{jalink|豊玉姫命}}、{{jalink|豊姫命}}？ 神社本庁教学研究所研究室『平成「祭」データ』（全国神社祭祀祭礼総合調査本庁委員会、1995年） | 神体 = | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社、旧村社 | 創建 = {{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}～{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}}代 | 本殿 = | 札所等 = | 宮司 = | 別名 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nagasaki|label=乙和多都美
神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''乙和多都美神社'''（おとわたつみじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|長崎県|Q169376}}{{jalink|対馬市|Q991032}}{{jalink|厳原町|Q11410123}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記された{{jalink|式内社}}・和多都美神社の論社。 === 概要 === 創建の時期は不詳であるが、社伝によると、{{jalink|神功皇后|Q232803}}が当地に船を泊め、神を祀ったという。 {{jalink|下県郡|Q10868678}}で唯一（{{jalink|和多都美神社|Q18457651}}一帯ははかつて{{jalink|上県郡|Q10868208}}であった）の「和多都美神社」であり、『対馬神社誌』には「和田津美大明神」と記されている 式内社研究会『式内社調査報告書』（{{jalink|皇学館大学}}出版部）。 『対馬神社誌』の記事の全文では、普通の村の氏神を記しているのと変わらず、和多都美神社としての特色も見られず、官社の伝統も見られない 式内社研究会『式内社調査報告書』（皇学館大学出版部）。 === 参考文献 === * 『対馬神社誌』,長崎県対馬神社総代会,1966. 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3451609 (参照 2025-06-09) === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 出典 === {{reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=長崎県}} {{神道 横}} {{デフォルトソート:おとわたつみしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tsushima]] [[Category:長崎県の神社]] [[Category:対馬市の歴史]] [[Category:対馬市の建築物]] [[Category:対馬島の式内社]] [[Category:神功皇后]] [[Category:pages]]

{{Expand Japanese|乙和多都美神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Otowatatsumi Shrine | native_name = 乙和多都美神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Otowatatsumi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.129194444444444|129.25855555555555}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Otowatatsumi Shrine'''|乙和多都美神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Q845945|lt=Q845945|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Q135022918|lt=Q135022918|WD=Q135022918}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|WD=Q135026601}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11458212|lt=Q11458212|WD=Q11458212}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.129194444444444|129.25855555555555}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|lt=Q135037878|WD=Q135037878}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306092955/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/680202.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183377 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041548|lt=Q135041548|WD=Q135041548}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '長崎県対馬市厳原町中村', 'language': 'ja'} == described at URL (P973) == * https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183377 [[JA:乙和多都美神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930328}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine | Name = Otowatatsumi Shrine | Image = {{Image needed|cat=Tsushima City}} | Location = {{jalink|Nagasaki Prefecture|Q169376}}{{jalink|Tsushima City|Q991032}}{{jalink|Izuhara Town|Q11410123}} Kuwa, Azahigashihama 1 | Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Tamayorihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Toyotamahime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Toyohime-no-Mikoto}}? Jinja Honchō Institute for Doctrinal Studies, Research Office, *Heisei “Matsuri” Data* (National Comprehensive Survey of Shrine Rites and Festivals, Jinja Honchō Committee, 1995) | Sacred object = | Shrine rank = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (candidate), former village shrine | Established = Reigns of {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}}–{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} | Main hall = | Pilgrimage sites = | Chief priest = | Alternative name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{Location map|Japan Nagasaki|label=Otowatatsumi
Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Otowatatsumi Shrine''' (おとわたつみじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in {{jalink|Izuhara Town|Q11410123}}, {{jalink|Tsushima City|Q991032}}, {{jalink|Nagasaki Prefecture|Q169376}}. It is considered a candidate site (ronsha) for the Shikinaisha Watatsumi Shrine recorded in the '{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'. === Overview === The date of establishment is unknown; however, according to shrine tradition, {{jalink|Empress Jingū|Q232803}} moored her ship at this location and enshrined the deity. It is the only “Watatsumi Shrine” in {{jalink|Shimoken District|Q10868678}} (the {{jalink|Watatsumi Shrine|Q18457651}} area was formerly in {{jalink|Kamikō District|Q10868208}}), and in the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer* it is recorded as “Wadatsumi Daimyōjin.” Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* ({{jalink|Kōgakkan University}} Press) In the full text of the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, the description is no different from that of an ordinary village tutelary shrine; no distinctive characteristics as a Watatsumi Shrine are noted, nor is there any indication of traditions associated with official shrines. Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* (Kōgakkan University Press) === References === * *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, Tsushima Shrine Representatives Association of Nagasaki Prefecture, 1966. National Diet Library Digital Collection https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3451609 (accessed 2025-06-09) === Notes === {{Footnote help}} === Sources === {{reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=Nagasaki Prefecture}} {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Otowatatsumijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tsushima]] [[Category:長崎県の神社]] [[Category:対馬市の歴史]] [[Category:対馬市の建築物]] [[Category:対馬島の式内社]] [[Category:神功皇后]] [[Category:pages]]

{{Infobox religious building | name = Otowatatsumi Shrine | native_name = 乙和多都美神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Otowatatsumi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.129194444444444|129.25855555555555}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Otowatatsumi Shrine'''|乙和多都美神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Q845945|lt=Q845945|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Q135022918|lt=Q135022918|WD=Q135022918}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|WD=Q135026601}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11458212|lt=Q11458212|WD=Q11458212}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.129194444444444|129.25855555555555}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|lt=Q135037878|WD=Q135037878}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306092955/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/680202.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183377 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041548|lt=Q135041548|WD=Q135041548}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '長崎県対馬市厳原町中村', 'language': 'ja'} == described at URL (P973) == * https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183377 [[JA:乙和多都美神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930328}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine | Name = Otowatatsumi Shrine | Image = {{Image needed|cat=Tsushima City}} | Location = {{jalink|Nagasaki Prefecture|Q169376}}{{jalink|Tsushima City|Q991032}}{{jalink|Izuhara Town|Q11410123}} Kuwa, Azahigashihama 1 | Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Tamayorihime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Toyotamahime-no-Mikoto}}, {{jalink|Toyohime-no-Mikoto}}? Jinja Honchō Institute for Doctrinal Studies, Research Office, *Heisei “Matsuri” Data* (National Comprehensive Survey of Shrine Rites and Festivals, Jinja Honchō Committee, 1995) | Sacred object = | Shrine rank = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (candidate), former village shrine | Established = Reigns of {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}}–{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} | Main hall = | Pilgrimage sites = | Chief priest = | Alternative name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{Location map|Japan Nagasaki|label=Otowatatsumi
Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Otowatatsumi Shrine''' (おとわたつみじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in {{jalink|Izuhara Town|Q11410123}}, {{jalink|Tsushima City|Q991032}}, {{jalink|Nagasaki Prefecture|Q169376}}. It is considered a candidate site (ronsha) for the Shikinaisha Watatsumi Shrine recorded in the '{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'. === Overview === The date of establishment is unknown; however, according to shrine tradition, {{jalink|Empress Jingū|Q232803}} moored her ship at this location and enshrined the deity. It is the only “Watatsumi Shrine” in {{jalink|Shimoken District|Q10868678}} (the {{jalink|Watatsumi Shrine|Q18457651}} area was formerly in {{jalink|Kamikō District|Q10868208}}), and in the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer* it is recorded as “Wadatsumi Daimyōjin.” Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* ({{jalink|Kōgakkan University}} Press) In the full text of the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, the description is no different from that of an ordinary village tutelary shrine; no distinctive characteristics as a Watatsumi Shrine are noted, nor is there any indication of traditions associated with official shrines. Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* (Kōgakkan University Press) === References === * *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, Tsushima Shrine Representatives Association of Nagasaki Prefecture, 1966. National Diet Library Digital Collection https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3451609 (accessed 2025-06-09) === Notes === {{Footnote help}} === Sources === {{reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=Nagasaki Prefecture}} {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Otowatatsumijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Otowatatsumi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tsushima]] [[Category:長崎県の神社]] [[Category:対馬市の歴史]] [[Category:対馬市の建築物]] [[Category:対馬島の式内社]] [[Category:神功皇后]] [[Category:pages]]

It is located in [[Tsushima]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Q845945|lt=Q845945|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Q135022918|lt=Q135022918|WD=Q135022918}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|WD=Q135026601}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11458212|lt=Q11458212|WD=Q11458212}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.129194444444444|129.25855555555555}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|lt=Q135037878|WD=Q135037878}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306092955/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/680202.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183377 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041548|lt=Q135041548|WD=Q135041548}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '長崎県対馬市厳原町中村', 'language': 'ja'} == described at URL (P973) == * https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183377 [[JA:乙和多都美神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134930328}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine | Name = Otowatatsumi Shrine | Image = {{Image needed|cat=Tsushima City}} | Location = {{ill|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture|Q169376|WD=Q169376}}{{ill|lt=Tsushima City|Q991032|WD=Q991032}}{{ill|lt=Izuhara Town|Q11410123|WD=Q11410123}} Kuwa, Azahigashihama 1 | Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deities = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tamayorihime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Toyotamahime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Toyohime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}? Jinja Honchō Institute for Doctrinal Studies, Research Office, *Heisei “Matsuri” Data* (National Comprehensive Survey of Shrine Rites and Festivals, Jinja Honchō Committee, 1995) | Sacred object = | Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} (candidate), former village shrine | Established = Reigns of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}}–{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}} | Main hall = | Pilgrimage sites = | Chief priest = | Alternative name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{Location map|Japan Nagasaki|label=Otowatatsumi
Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Otowatatsumi Shrine''' (おとわたつみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in {{ill|lt=Izuhara Town|Q11410123|WD=Q11410123}}, {{ill|lt=Tsushima City|Q991032|WD=Q991032}}, {{ill|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture|Q169376|WD=Q169376}}. It is considered a candidate site (ronsha) for the Shikinaisha Watatsumi Shrine recorded in the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}'. === Overview === The date of establishment is unknown; however, according to shrine tradition, {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803}} moored her ship at this location and enshrined the deity. It is the only “Watatsumi Shrine” in {{ill|lt=Shimoken District|Q10868678|WD=Q10868678}} (the {{ill|lt=Watatsumi Shrine|Q18457651|WD=Q18457651}} area was formerly in {{ill|lt=Kamikō District|Q10868208|WD=Q10868208}}), and in the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer* it is recorded as “Wadatsumi Daimyōjin.” Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kōgakkan University|UNKNOWN}} Press) In the full text of the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, the description is no different from that of an ordinary village tutelary shrine; no distinctive characteristics as a Watatsumi Shrine are noted, nor is there any indication of traditions associated with official shrines. Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* (Kōgakkan University Press) === References === * *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, Tsushima Shrine Representatives Association of Nagasaki Prefecture, 1966. National Diet Library Digital Collection https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/3451609 (accessed 2025-06-09) === Notes === {{Footnote help}} === Sources === {{reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=Nagasaki Prefecture}} {{Shinto sidebar}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Otowatatsumijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Otowatatsumi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Otowatatsumi Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tsushima]] [[Category:長崎県の神社]] [[Category:対馬市の歴史]] [[Category:対馬市の建築物]] [[Category:対馬島の式内社]] [[Category:神功皇后]] [[Category:pages]]

Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Otowatatsumi Shrine''' (おとわたつみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Izuhara Town|Q11410123|WD=Q11410123|1=Izuhara}}, {{ill|lt=Tsushima City|Q991032|WD=Q991032|1=Tsushima, Nagasaki}}, {{ill|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture|Q169376|WD=Q169376|1=Nagasaki Prefecture}}. It is considered a candidate site (ronsha) for the Shikinaisha Watatsumi Shrine recorded in the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'. === Overview === The date of establishment is unknown; however, according to shrine tradition, {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} moored her ship at this location and enshrined the deity. It is the only “Watatsumi Shrine” in {{ill|lt=Shimoken District|Q10868678|WD=Q10868678|1=Shimoagata district}} (the {{ill|lt=Watatsumi Shrine|Q18457651|WD=Q18457651|1=Watazumi Shrine}} area was formerly in {{ill|lt=Kamikō District|Q10868208|WD=Q10868208|1=Kamiagata district}}), and in the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer* it is recorded as “Wadatsumi Daimyōjin.” Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kōgakkan University|1=UNKNOWN}} Press) In the full text of the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, the description is no different from that of an ordinary village tutelary shrine; no distinctive characteristics as a Watatsumi Shrine are noted, nor is there any indication of traditions associated with official shrines. Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* (Kōgakkan University Press) === References === * *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, Tsushima Shrine Representatives Association of Nagasaki Prefecture, 1966. It is considered a candidate site (ronsha) for the Shikinaisha Watatsumi Shrine recorded in the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'. === Overview === The date of establishment is unknown; however, according to shrine tradition, {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|WD=Q232803|1=Empress Jingū}} moored her ship at this location and enshrined the deity. It is the only “Watatsumi Shrine” in {{ill|lt=Shimoken District|Q10868678|WD=Q10868678|1=Shimoagata district}} (the {{ill|lt=Watatsumi Shrine|Q18457651|WD=Q18457651|1=Watazumi Shrine}} area was formerly in {{ill|lt=Kamikō District|Q10868208|WD=Q10868208|1=Kamiagata district}}), and in the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer* it is recorded as “Wadatsumi Daimyōjin.” Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kōgakkan University|1=UNKNOWN}} Press) In the full text of the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, the description is no different from that of an ordinary village tutelary shrine; no distinctive characteristics as a Watatsumi Shrine are noted, nor is there any indication of traditions associated with official shrines. It is the only “Watatsumi Shrine” in {{ill|lt=Shimoken District|Q10868678|WD=Q10868678|1=Shimoagata district}} (the {{ill|lt=Watatsumi Shrine|Q18457651|WD=Q18457651|1=Watazumi Shrine}} area was formerly in {{ill|lt=Kamikō District|Q10868208|WD=Q10868208|1=Kamiagata district}}), and in the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer* it is recorded as “Wadatsumi Daimyōjin.” Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kōgakkan University|1=UNKNOWN}} Press) In the full text of the *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, the description is no different from that of an ordinary village tutelary shrine; no distinctive characteristics as a Watatsumi Shrine are noted, nor is there any indication of traditions associated with official shrines. Shikinaisha Research Association, *Report of the Shikinaisha Survey* (Kōgakkan University Press) === References === * *Tsushima Shrine Gazetteer*, Tsushima Shrine Representatives Association of Nagasaki Prefecture, 1966.
